About Women Safety Monitoring System

This system is designed to enhance women's safety during travel. It uses GPS tracking, emergency alerts, and location sharing to ensure quick response during dangerous situations.

Real-time Tracking

Track your journey with live GPS monitoring.

Emergency Alerts

Automatically notify trusted contacts.

Police Assistance

Locate nearby police stations instantly.

) } export default About;
